texto: Relate to a life situation in the deepest sense: not from the standpoint of the ego that bemoans its fate and rebels against it, but from... the greater inner law that has left behind its small birth, the narrow realm of personal outlook, for the sake of renewal and rebirth.
explicacao: Citação de Max Zeller sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Relate to a life situation in the deepest sense: not from the standpoint of the ego that bemoans …” articula reflexao, ego, self em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como self e supreme-identity.
